question: How many countries does each continent have? List the continent id, continent name and the number of countries.
answer_sql:
SELECT 
    c.ContId, 
    c.Continent, 
    COUNT(co.CountryId) AS number_of_countries
FROM 
    continents c
LEFT JOIN 
    countries co ON c.ContId = co.Continent
GROUP BY 
    c.ContId, c.Continent;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: For each continent, list its id, name, and how many countries it has?
answer_sql:
SELECT c.ContId, c.Continent, COUNT(co.CountryId) AS country_count
FROM continents c
LEFT JOIN countries co ON c.ContId = co.Continent
GROUP BY c.ContId, c.Continent;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: How many models does each car maker produce? List maker full name, id and the number.
answer_sql:
SELECT car_makers.FullName, car_makers.Id, COUNT(model_list.Model) AS model_count
FROM car_makers
JOIN model_list ON car_makers.Id = model_list.Maker
GROUP BY car_makers.FullName, car_makers.Id;

question: What is the full name of each car maker, along with its id and how many models it produces?
answer_sql:
SELECT car_makers.FullName, car_makers.Id, COUNT(*) AS model_count
FROM car_makers
JOIN model_list ON car_makers.Id = model_list.Maker
GROUP BY car_makers.FullName, car_makers.Id;

question: What is the name of the different car makers who produced a car in 1970?
answer_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT car_makers.Maker
FROM car_makers
JOIN model_list ON car_makers.Id = model_list.Maker
JOIN car_names ON model_list.Model = car_names.Model
JOIN cars_data ON car_names.MakeId = cars_data.Id
WHERE cars_data.Year = 1970;

question: Find the make and production time of the cars that were produced in the earliest year?
answer_sql:
SELECT cn.Make, cd.Year
FROM car_names cn
JOIN cars_data cd ON cn.MakeId = cd.Id
WHERE cd.Year = (SELECT MIN(Year) FROM cars_data);
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What are the different models for the cards produced after 1980?
answer_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cm.Model
FROM car_names cn
JOIN model_list cm ON cn.Model = cm.Model
JOIN cars_data cd ON cn.MakeId = cd.Id
WHERE cd.Year > 1980;

question: How many car makers are there in each continents? List the continent name and the count.
answer_sql:
SELECT continents.Continent, COUNT(car_makers.Id) AS count
FROM car_makers
JOIN countries ON car_makers.Country = countries.CountryId
JOIN continents ON countries.Continent = continents.ContId
GROUP BY continents.Continent;

question: What is the document name and template id for document with description with the letter 'w' in it?
answer_sql: SELECT Document_Name, Template_ID FROM Documents WHERE Document_Description LIKE '%w%';

question: Return the names and template ids for documents that contain the letter w in their description.
answer_sql: SELECT Document_Name, Template_ID FROM Documents WHERE Document_Description LIKE '%w%';

question: Count the number of documents that use the PPT template type.
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Documents JOIN Templates ON Documents.Template_ID = Templates.Template_ID JOIN Ref_Template_Types ON Templates.Template_Type_Code = Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code WHERE Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code = 'PPT';
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: What are all different template ids used for documents, and how many times were each of them used?
Show ids for all templates that are used by more than one document.
answer_sql:
SELECT Template_ID
FROM Documents
GROUP BY Template_ID
HAVING COUNT(Document_ID) > 1;

question: What are the template ids of any templates used in more than a single document?
answer_sql:
SELECT Template_ID
FROM Documents
GROUP BY Template_ID
HAVING COUNT(Document_ID) > 1;

question: Show all distinct template type codes for all templates.
answer_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Template_Type_Code FROM Templates;

question: What are the different template type codes?
answer_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Template_Type_Code FROM Ref_Template_Types;

question: Which states have both owners and professionals living there?
answer_sql: SELECT DISTINCT state FROM Owners INTERSECT SELECT DISTINCT state FROM Professionals;

question: Which professionals live in the state of Indiana or have done treatment on more than 2 treatments? List his or her id, last name and cell phone.
answer_sql:
SELECT professional_id, last_name, cell_number
FROM Professionals
WHERE state = 'Indiana'
UNION
SELECT p.professional_id, p.last_name, p.cell_number
FROM Professionals p
JOIN Treatments t ON p.professional_id = t.professional_id
GROUP BY p.professional_id, p.last_name, p.cell_number
HAVING COUNT(t.treatment_id) > 2;

question: Which professional did not operate any treatment on dogs? List the professional's id, role and email.
Which owner owns the most dogs? List the owner id, first name and last name.
answer_sql:
SELECT o.owner_id, o.first_name, o.last_name
FROM Owners o
JOIN Dogs d ON o.owner_id = d.owner_id
GROUP BY o.owner_id, o.first_name, o.last_name
ORDER BY COUNT(d.dog_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Return the owner id, first name and last name of the owner who has the most dogs.
answer_sql:
SELECT Owners.owner_id, Owners.first_name, Owners.last_name
FROM Owners
JOIN Dogs ON Owners.owner_id = Dogs.owner_id
GROUP BY Owners.owner_id, Owners.first_name, Owners.last_name
ORDER BY COUNT(Dogs.dog_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Which professionals have done at least two treatments? List the professional's id, role, and first name.
answer_sql:
SELECT p.professional_id, p.role_code, p.first_name
FROM Professionals p
JOIN Treatments t ON p.professional_id = t.professional_id
GROUP BY p.professional_id, p.role_code, p.first_name
HAVING COUNT(t.treatment_id) >= 2;

question: What are the id, role, and first name of the professionals who have performed two or more treatments?
answer_sql:
SELECT p.professional_id, p.role_code, p.first_name
FROM Professionals p
JOIN Treatments t ON p.professional_id = t.professional_id
GROUP BY p.professional_id, p.role_code, p.first_name
HAVING COUNT(t.treatment_id) >= 2;

question: What is the name of the breed with the most dogs?
answer_sql:
SELECT Breeds.breed_name
FROM Breeds
JOIN Dogs ON Breeds.breed_code = Dogs.breed_code
GROUP BY Breeds.breed_name
ORDER BY COUNT(Dogs.dog_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: How many flights depart from City Aberdeen?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flights JOIN airports ON flights.SourceAirport = airports.AirportCode WHERE airports.City = 'Aberdeen';
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: How many flights arriving in Aberdeen city?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flights JOIN airports ON flights.DestAirport = airports.AirportCode WHERE airports.City = 'Aberdeen';
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: Return the number of flights arriving in Aberdeen.
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flights JOIN airports ON flights.DestAirport = airports.AirportCode WHERE airports.City = 'Aberdeen';
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: How many flights does airline 'JetBlue Airways' have?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flights JOIN airlines ON flights.Airline = airlines.uid WHERE airlines.Airline = 'JetBlue Airways';
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: Give the number of Jetblue Airways flights.
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flights JOIN airlines ON flights.Airline = airlines.uid WHERE UPPER(airlines.Airline) = 'JETBLUE AIRWAYS';
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: Which city has most number of arriving flights?
answer_sql:
SELECT airports.City
FROM flights
JOIN airports ON flights.DestAirport = airports.AirportCode
GROUP BY airports.City
ORDER BY COUNT(flights.DestAirport) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Which city has the most frequent destination airport?
answer_sql:
SELECT airports.City, COUNT(flights.DestAirport) AS destination_count
FROM flights
JOIN airports ON flights.DestAirport = airports.AirportCode
GROUP BY airports.City
ORDER BY destination_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Which city has most number of departing flights?
answer_sql:
SELECT airports.City
FROM flights
JOIN airports ON flights.SourceAirport = airports.AirportCode
GROUP BY airports.City
ORDER BY COUNT(flights.SourceAirport) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Show the number of high schoolers for each grade.
How many high schoolers are in each grade?
Which grade has the most high schoolers?
answer_sql:
SELECT grade
FROM Highschooler
GROUP BY grade
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Return the grade that has the greatest number of high schoolers.
answer_sql:
SELECT grade
FROM Highschooler
GROUP BY grade
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Show me all grades that have at least 4 students.
answer_sql:
SELECT grade
FROM Highschooler
GROUP BY grade
HAVING COUNT(ID) >= 4;

question: Which grades have 4 or more high schoolers?
answer_sql:
SELECT grade
FROM Highschooler
GROUP BY grade
HAVING COUNT(Highschooler.ID) >= 4;

question: Show the student IDs and numbers of friends corresponding to each.
Show the names of high school students and their corresponding number of friends.
answer_sql:
SELECT h.name, COUNT(f.friend_id) AS num_friends
FROM Highschooler h
JOIN Friend f ON h.ID = f.student_id
GROUP BY h.ID, h.name;

question: How many different nationalities do conductors have?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Nationality) FROM conductor;

question: Count the number of different nationalities of conductors.
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Nationality) FROM conductor;

question: List the name of the conductor with the most years of work.
answer_sql: SELECT Name FROM conductor ORDER BY Year_of_Work DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the name of the conductor who has worked the greatest number of years?
answer_sql: SELECT Name FROM conductor ORDER BY Year_of_Work DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Show the names of conductors that have conducted more than one orchestras.
answer_sql:
SELECT c.Name
FROM conductor c
JOIN orchestra o ON c.Conductor_ID = o.Conductor_ID
GROUP BY c.Conductor_ID, c.Name
HAVING COUNT(o.Orchestra_ID) > 1;

question: What are the names of conductors who have conducted at more than one orchestra?
answer_sql:
SELECT conductor.name
FROM conductor
JOIN orchestra ON conductor.Conductor_ID = orchestra.Conductor_ID
GROUP BY conductor.Conductor_ID, conductor.name
HAVING COUNT(orchestra.Orchestra_ID) > 1;

question: Please show the name of the conductor that has conducted orchestras founded after 2008.
answer_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.Name
FROM conductor c
JOIN orchestra o ON c.Conductor_ID = o.Conductor_ID
WHERE o.Year_of_Founded > 2008;

question: What are the names of conductors who have conducted orchestras founded after the year 2008?
answer_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT conductor.Name
FROM conductor
JOIN orchestra ON conductor.Conductor_ID = orchestra.Conductor_ID
WHERE orchestra.Year_of_Founded > 2008;

question: Which department offers the most number of degrees? List department name and id.
answer_sql:
SELECT Departments.department_name, Departments.department_id
FROM Departments
JOIN Degree_Programs ON Departments.department_id = Degree_Programs.department_id
GROUP BY Departments.department_id, Departments.department_name
ORDER BY COUNT(Degree_Programs.degree_program_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the name and id of the department with the most number of degrees ?
answer_sql:
SELECT Departments.department_name, Departments.department_id
FROM Departments
JOIN Degree_Programs ON Departments.department_id = Degree_Programs.department_id
GROUP BY Departments.department_id, Departments.department_name
ORDER BY COUNT(Degree_Programs.degree_program_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: How many departments offer any degree?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT department_id) FROM Degree_Programs;

question: How many different departments offer degrees?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT department_id) FROM Degree_Programs;

question: How many different degree names are offered?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT degree_summary_name) FROM Degree_Programs;

question: How many different degrees are offered?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT degree_summary_name) FROM Degree_Programs;

question: What are the names and id of courses having at most 2 sections?
answer_sql:
SELECT c.course_name, c.course_id
FROM Courses c
JOIN Sections s ON c.course_id = s.course_id
GROUP BY c.course_id, c.course_name
HAVING COUNT(s.section_id) <= 2;

question: What is the semester which most student registered in? Show both the name and the id.
answer_sql:
SELECT Semesters.semester_name, Semesters.semester_id
FROM Semesters
JOIN Student_Enrolment ON Semesters.semester_id = Student_Enrolment.semester_id
GROUP BY Semesters.semester_id, Semesters.semester_name
ORDER BY COUNT(Student_Enrolment.student_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: List the title of all cartoon directed by "Ben Jones" or "Brandon Vietti".
answer_sql: SELECT DISTINCT Title FROM Cartoon WHERE Directed_by = "Ben Jones" OR Directed_by = "Brandon Vietti";

question: Which country has the most of TV Channels? List the country and number of TV Channels it has.
answer_sql:
SELECT Country, COUNT(*) AS channel_count
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY channel_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the country with the most number of TV Channels and how many does it have?
answer_sql:
SELECT Country, COUNT(TV_Channel.id) AS channel_count
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Country
ORDER BY channel_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: List the number of different series names and contents in the TV Channel table.
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT series_name) AS series_count, COUNT(DISTINCT content) AS content_count FROM TV_Channel;

question: How many different series and contents are listed in the TV Channel table?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT series_name) AS different_series, COUNT(DISTINCT Content) AS different_contents FROM TV_Channel;

question: List the language used least number of TV Channel. List language and number of TV Channel.
answer_sql:
SELECT Language, COUNT(id) AS channel_count
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Language
ORDER BY channel_count ASC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What are the languages used by the least number of TV Channels and how many channels use it?
answer_sql:
SELECT Language, COUNT(*) AS channel_count
FROM TV_Channel
GROUP BY Language
ORDER BY channel_count ASC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: List each language and the number of TV Channels using it.
Which language is the most popular in Aruba?
answer_sql:
SELECT countrylanguage.Language
FROM country
JOIN countrylanguage ON country.Code = countrylanguage.CountryCode
WHERE country.Name = 'Aruba'
ORDER BY countrylanguage.Percentage DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the name of country that has the shortest life expectancy in Asia?
answer_sql:
SELECT Name
FROM country
WHERE Continent = 'Asia'
ORDER BY LifeExpectancy ASC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Give the name of the country in Asia with the lowest life expectancy.
answer_sql: SELECT Name FROM country WHERE Continent = 'Asia' ORDER BY LifeExpectancy ASC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the total population and maximum GNP in Asia?
answer_sql: SELECT SUM(Population) AS total_population, MAX(GNP) AS max_gnp FROM country WHERE Continent = 'Asia';
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: How many people live in Asia, and what is the largest GNP among them?
answer_sql: SELECT SUM(Population) AS total_population, MAX(GNP) AS largest_gnp FROM country WHERE Continent = 'Asia';
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Give the mean GNP and total population of nations which are considered US territory.
How many unique languages are spoken in the world?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Language) FROM countrylanguage;

question: What is the number of distinct languages used around the world?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Language) FROM countrylanguage;

question: What is the best rank of losers across all matches?
answer_sql: SELECT MIN(loser_rank) FROM matches;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: find the number of distinct country codes of all players.
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT country_code) FROM players;

question: How many distinct countries do players come from?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT country_code) FROM players;

question: Find the number of distinct name of losers.
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT loser_name) FROM matches;

question: How many different loser names are there?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT loser_name) FROM matches;

question: Find the name of tourney that has more than 10 matches.
answer_sql:
SELECT tourney_name
FROM matches
GROUP BY tourney_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10;

question: What are the names of tournaments that have more than 10 matches?
answer_sql:
SELECT tourney_name
FROM matches
GROUP BY tourney_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10;

question: What are the country code and first name of the players who won in both tourney WTA Championships and Australian Open?
answer_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT players.country_code, players.first_name
FROM players
JOIN matches ON players.player_id = matches.winner_id
WHERE matches.tourney_name = 'WTA Championships'
INTERSECT
SELECT DISTINCT players.country_code, players.first_name
FROM players
JOIN matches ON players.player_id = matches.winner_id
WHERE matches.tourney_name = 'Australian Open';

question: Which model of the car has the minimum horsepower?
answer_sql: SELECT model_list.Model FROM cars_data INNER JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId INNER JOIN model_list ON car_names.Model = model_list.Model ORDER BY cars_data.Horsepower ASC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Which distinct car models are the produced after 1980?
answer_sql: SELECT DISTINCT model_list.Model FROM model_list INNER JOIN car_names ON car_names.Model = model_list.Model INNER JOIN cars_data ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId WHERE cars_data.Year > 1980;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: What is the number of makers of care in France?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(car_makers.Maker) FROM car_makers JOIN countries ON car_makers.Country = countries.CountryId WHERE LOWER(countries.CountryName) = LOWER('France');
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: How many car models are produced in the usa?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(model_list.ModelId) FROM model_list INNER JOIN car_makers ON model_list.Maker = car_makers.Id INNER JOIN countries ON car_makers.Country = countries.CountryId WHERE LOWER(countries.CountryName) = LOWER('USA');
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: Which countries in europe have at least 3 car manufacturers?
answer_sql:
SELECT countries.CountryName
FROM continents
JOIN countries ON countries.Continent = continents.ContId
JOIN car_makers ON car_makers.Country = countries.CountryId
WHERE LOWER(continents.Continent) = LOWER('Europe')
GROUP BY countries.CountryName
HAVING COUNT(car_makers.Id) >= 3;

question: What are the names of all European countries with at least 3 manufacturers?
answer_sql:
SELECT countries.CountryName
FROM continents
JOIN countries ON continents.ContId = countries.Continent
JOIN car_makers ON countries.CountryId = car_makers.Country
WHERE LOWER(continents.Continent) = LOWER('Europe')
GROUP BY countries.CountryName
HAVING COUNT(car_makers.Id) >= 3;

question: What is the largest amount of horsepower for the models with 3 cylinders and what make is it?
answer_sql: SELECT cars_data.Horsepower, car_names.Make FROM cars_data JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId WHERE cars_data.Cylinders = 3 ORDER BY cars_data.Horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Which model saves the most gasoline? That is to say, have the maximum miles per gallon.
answer_sql: SELECT car_names.Model FROM cars_data JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId JOIN model_list ON car_names.Model = model_list.Model ORDER BY cars_data.MPG DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the car model with the highest mpg ?
answer_sql: SELECT car_names.Model FROM cars_data JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId JOIN model_list ON car_names.Model = model_list.Model ORDER BY cars_data.MPG DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the average horsepower for all cars produced before 1980 ?
answer_sql: SELECT AVG(cars_data.Horsepower) FROM cars_data WHERE cars_data.Year < 1980;

question: What is the number of car models created by the car maker American Motor Company?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(model_list.ModelId) FROM car_makers JOIN model_list ON model_list.Maker = car_makers.Id WHERE LOWER(car_makers.FullName) = LOWER('American Motor Company');
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: What is the horsepower of the car with the largest accelerate?
answer_sql: SELECT cars_data.Horsepower FROM cars_data INNER JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId ORDER BY cars_data.Accelerate DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the horsepower of the car with the greatest accelerate?
answer_sql: SELECT cars_data.Horsepower FROM cars_data INNER JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId ORDER BY cars_data.Accelerate DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: How many countries has more than 2 car makers ?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM car_makers JOIN countries ON car_makers.Country = countries.CountryId GROUP BY countries.CountryId HAVING COUNT(car_makers.Id) > 2;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: For the cars with 4 cylinders, which model has the largest horsepower?
answer_sql: SELECT model_list.Model FROM cars_data INNER JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId INNER JOIN model_list ON car_names.Model = model_list.Model WHERE cars_data.Cylinders = 4 ORDER BY cars_data.Horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: For all of the 4 cylinder cars, which model has the most horsepower?
answer_sql: SELECT model_list.Model FROM cars_data INNER JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId INNER JOIN model_list ON car_names.Model = model_list.Model WHERE cars_data.Cylinders = 4 ORDER BY cars_data.Horsepower DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the maximum miles per gallon of the car with 8 cylinders or produced before 1980 ?
answer_sql: SELECT MAX(cars_data.MPG) FROM cars_data WHERE cars_data.Cylinders = 8 OR cars_data.Year < 1980;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the maximum mpg of the cars that had 8 cylinders or that were produced before 1980 ?
answer_sql: SELECT MAX(cars_data.MPG) FROM cars_data WHERE cars_data.Cylinders = 8 OR cars_data.Year < 1980;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What are the different models wthat are lighter than 3500 but were not built by the Ford Motor Company?
answer_sql: SELECT DISTINCT model_list.Model FROM cars_data INNER JOIN car_names ON cars_data.Id = car_names.MakeId INNER JOIN model_list ON car_names.Model = model_list.Model INNER JOIN car_makers ON model_list.Maker = car_makers.Id WHERE cars_data.Weight < 3500 AND car_makers.FullName != 'Ford Motor Company';
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: What are the ids and names of all countries that either have more than 3 car makers or produce fiat model ?
answer_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT countries.CountryId, countries.CountryName
FROM countries
JOIN car_makers ON countries.CountryId = car_makers.Country
JOIN model_list ON car_makers.Id = model_list.Maker
WHERE LOWER(model_list.Model) = LOWER('fiat')
UNION
SELECT countries.CountryId, countries.CountryName
FROM countries
JOIN car_makers ON countries.CountryId = car_makers.Country
GROUP BY countries.CountryId, countries.CountryName
HAVING COUNT(car_makers.Id) > 3;

question: Which abbreviation corresponds to Jetblue Airways?
answer_sql: SELECT airlines.Abbreviation FROM airlines WHERE LOWER(airlines.Airline) = LOWER('Jetblue Airways');

question: How many airlines are from USA?
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM airlines WHERE LOWER(airlines.Country) = LOWER('USA');

question: Return the number of airlines in the USA.
answer_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM airlines WHERE LOWER(airlines.Country) = LOWER('USA');

question: What is the code of airport that has the highest number of flights?
answer_sql: SELECT flights.SourceAirport FROM flights INNER JOIN airports ON flights.SourceAirport = airports.AirportCode GROUP BY flights.SourceAirport ORDER BY COUNT(flights.SourceAirport) DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the airport code of the airport with the most flights?
answer_sql:
SELECT airports.AirportCode
FROM airports
INNER JOIN flights ON flights.SourceAirport = airports.AirportCode
GROUP BY airports.AirportCode
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the code of airport that has fewest number of flights?
answer_sql:
SELECT flights.SourceAirport
FROM flights
INNER JOIN airports ON flights.SourceAirport = airports.AirportCode
GROUP BY flights.SourceAirport
ORDER BY COUNT(flights.SourceAirport) ASC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Give the code of the airport with the least flights.
answer_sql:
SELECT airports.AirportCode
FROM airports
INNER JOIN flights ON flights.SourceAirport = airports.AirportCode
GROUP BY airports.AirportCode
ORDER BY COUNT(flights.SourceAirport) ASC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What airline serves the most flights?
answer_sql:
SELECT airlines.Airline
FROM airlines
INNER JOIN flights ON flights.Airline = airlines.uid
GROUP BY airlines.Airline
ORDER BY COUNT(flights.Airline) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Find the abbreviation and country of the airline that has fewest number of flights?
answer_sql:
SELECT airlines.Abbreviation, airlines.Country
FROM airlines
INNER JOIN flights ON airlines.uid = flights.Airline
GROUP BY airlines.Abbreviation, airlines.Country
ORDER BY COUNT(flights.Airline) ASC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Show all template ids and number of documents using each template.
answer_sql: SELECT Templates.Template_ID, COUNT(Documents.Document_ID) FROM Templates JOIN Documents ON Templates.Template_ID = Documents.Template_ID GROUP BY Templates.Template_ID;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: Show all template type codes that are not used by any document.
answer_sql: SELECT Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code FROM Ref_Template_Types WHERE Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code NOT IN (SELECT Templates.Template_Type_Code FROM Templates JOIN Documents ON Templates.Template_ID = Documents.Template_ID);
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: What are the codes of template types that are not used for any document?
answer_sql: SELECT Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code FROM Ref_Template_Types WHERE Ref_Template_Types.Template_Type_Code NOT IN (SELECT Templates.Template_Type_Code FROM Templates JOIN Documents ON Templates.Template_ID = Documents.Template_ID);
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: Show all document ids and the number of paragraphs in each document. Order by document id.
answer_sql: SELECT Documents.Document_ID, COUNT(Paragraphs.Paragraph_ID) FROM Documents INNER JOIN Paragraphs ON Paragraphs.Document_ID = Documents.Document_ID GROUP BY Documents.Document_ID ORDER BY Documents.Document_ID;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: Show all document ids, names and the number of paragraphs in each document.
answer_sql: SELECT Documents.Document_ID, Documents.Document_Name, COUNT(Paragraphs.Paragraph_ID) FROM Documents INNER JOIN Paragraphs ON Documents.Document_ID = Paragraphs.Document_ID GROUP BY Documents.Document_ID, Documents.Document_Name;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: What are the ids and names of each document, as well as the number of paragraphs in each?
answer_sql: SELECT Documents.Document_ID, Documents.Document_Name, COUNT(Paragraphs.Paragraph_ID) FROM Documents JOIN Paragraphs ON Documents.Document_ID = Paragraphs.Document_ID GROUP BY Documents.Document_ID, Documents.Document_Name;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: What is the name of the winner with the most rank points who participated in the Australian Open tournament?
answer_sql:
SELECT matches.winner_name
FROM matches
INNER JOIN players ON matches.winner_id = players.player_id
WHERE matches.tourney_name = 'Australian Open'
ORDER BY matches.winner_rank_points DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Find the average ranking for each player and their first name.
answer_sql:
SELECT players.first_name, AVG(rankings.ranking) AS average_ranking
FROM players
INNER JOIN rankings ON players.player_id = rankings.player_id
GROUP BY players.first_name;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: Find the total ranking points for each player and their first name.
answer_sql:
SELECT players.first_name, SUM(rankings.ranking_points) AS total_ranking_points
FROM players
INNER JOIN rankings ON players.player_id = rankings.player_id
GROUP BY players.first_name;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: What are the names and ranks of the three youngest winners across all matches?
answer_sql: SELECT matches.winner_name, matches.winner_rank FROM matches ORDER BY matches.winner_age ASC LIMIT 3;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: How is the math course described?
answer_sql: SELECT Courses.course_description FROM Courses WHERE LOWER(Courses.course_name) = LOWER('Math');

question: What are the descriptions for all the math courses?
answer_sql: SELECT course_description FROM Courses WHERE LOWER(course_name) LIKE '%math%';

question: For each semester, what is the name and id of the one with the most students registered?
answer_sql:
SELECT Semesters.semester_name, Semesters.semester_id
FROM Semesters
INNER JOIN Student_Enrolment ON Student_Enrolment.semester_id = Semesters.semester_id
GROUP BY Semesters.semester_id, Semesters.semester_name
ORDER BY COUNT(Student_Enrolment.student_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Who are enrolled in 2 degree programs in one semester? List the first name, middle name and last name and the id.
answer_sql:
SELECT Students.first_name, Students.middle_name, Students.last_name, Students.student_id
FROM Students
JOIN Student_Enrolment ON Students.student_id = Student_Enrolment.student_id
JOIN Degree_Programs ON Student_Enrolment.degree_program_id = Degree_Programs.degree_program_id
GROUP BY Students.student_id, Students.first_name, Students.middle_name, Students.last_name
HAVING COUNT(Degree_Programs.degree_program_id) = 2;

question: What are the first, middle, and last names, along with the ids, of all students who enrolled in 2 degree programs in one semester?
answer_sql:
SELECT Students.first_name, Students.middle_name, Students.last_name, Students.student_id
FROM Students
JOIN Student_Enrolment ON Students.student_id = Student_Enrolment.student_id
GROUP BY Students.student_id, Students.first_name, Students.middle_name, Students.last_name
HAVING COUNT(Student_Enrolment.degree_program_id) = 2;

question: On average, when were the transcripts printed?
answer_sql: SELECT AVG(transcript_date) FROM Transcripts;

question: What is the average transcript date?
answer_sql: SELECT AVG(transcript_date) FROM Transcripts;

question: List top 3 highest Rating  TV series. List the TV series's Episode and Rating.
answer_sql: SELECT TV_series.Episode, TV_series.Rating FROM TV_series ORDER BY TV_series.Rating DESC LIMIT 3;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Find the production code and channel of the most recently aired cartoon .
answer_sql: SELECT Cartoon.Production_code, Cartoon.Channel FROM Cartoon INNER JOIN TV_Channel ON Cartoon.Channel = TV_Channel.id ORDER BY Cartoon.Original_air_date DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the produdction code and channel of the most recent cartoon ?
answer_sql: SELECT Cartoon.Production_code, Cartoon.Channel FROM Cartoon INNER JOIN TV_Channel ON Cartoon.Channel = TV_Channel.id ORDER BY Cartoon.Original_air_date DESC LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What are the package options and the name of the series for the TV Channel that supports high definition TV?
answer_sql: SELECT TV_Channel.Package_Option, TV_Channel.series_name FROM TV_Channel WHERE TV_Channel.Hight_definition_TV = 'yes';

question: What is name of the country that speaks the largest number of languages?
answer_sql:
SELECT country.Name
FROM country
JOIN countrylanguage ON countrylanguage.CountryCode = country.Code
GROUP BY country.Name
ORDER BY COUNT(countrylanguage.Language) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What are the regions that use English or Dutch?
answer_sql: SELECT DISTINCT country.Region FROM country INNER JOIN countrylanguage ON country.Code = countrylanguage.CountryCode WHERE LOWER(countrylanguage.Language) = LOWER('English') OR LOWER(countrylanguage.Language) = LOWER('Dutch');
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: Which language is the most popular on the Asian continent?
answer_sql:
SELECT countrylanguage.Language
FROM country
INNER JOIN countrylanguage ON countrylanguage.CountryCode = country.Code
WHERE LOWER(country.Continent) = LOWER('Asia')
GROUP BY countrylanguage.Language
ORDER BY SUM(countrylanguage.Percentage) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What is the language that is used by the largest number of Asian nations?
answer_sql:
SELECT countrylanguage.Language
FROM country
INNER JOIN countrylanguage ON countrylanguage.CountryCode = country.Code
WHERE country.Continent = 'Asia'
GROUP BY countrylanguage.Language
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables
Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: What languages are only used by a single country with a republic government?
answer_sql:
SELECT countrylanguage.Language
FROM country
INNER JOIN countrylanguage ON countrylanguage.CountryCode = country.Code
WHERE country.GovernmentForm = 'Republic'
GROUP BY countrylanguage.Language
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT countrylanguage.CountryCode) = 1;
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: Return the different names of cities that are in Asia and for which Chinese is the official language.
answer_sql: SELECT DISTINCT city.Name FROM city INNER JOIN country ON city.CountryCode = country.Code INNER JOIN countrylanguage ON country.Code = countrylanguage.CountryCode WHERE country.Continent = 'Asia' AND countrylanguage.Language = 'Chinese' AND countrylanguage.IsOfficial = 'T';
rationale: Uses joins to link required tables

question: Find the government form name and total population for each government form whose average life expectancy is longer than 72.
answer_sql:
SELECT country.GovernmentForm, SUM(country.Population) AS total_population
FROM country
GROUP BY country.GovernmentForm
HAVING AVG(country.LifeExpectancy) > 72;

question: What are the maximum and minimum share of performances whose type is not "Live final".
answer_sql: SELECT MAX(performance.Share), MIN(performance.Share) FROM performance WHERE performance.Type != 'Live final';
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum

question: Return the maximum and minimum shares for performances that do not have the type "Live final".
answer_sql: SELECT MAX(performance.Share), MIN(performance.Share) FROM performance WHERE performance.Type != 'Live final';
rationale: Orders by metric with limit for extremum
